notes: Filenames are anonymized (media01…). Update expected values manually. quarter_turn_cw: 0, 90, 180, 270. Use 0 when no quarter-turn rotate should be suggested.

cases.notes: Rotation is important. Crop useful to remove blank margins on two sides.
Must not rotate (only small vertical tilt). Optional crop of blank margins on all sides.
Face not detected on original; detected on rotated preview — rotation cue. Crop useful for side margins.
Two people; face(s) detectable on wrongly oriented original. Crop useful for side margins.
Rotation important. Optional crop for side margins.
